scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && cargo watch -w core/src -w server/src -w core/Cargo.toml -w server/Cargo.toml -w Cargo.toml -x 'run -p whylowdps-server'
scripts.desktop:dev: cross-env DESKTOP_BUILD=true CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_desktop tauri dev --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.desktop:build: cross-env DESKTOP_BUILD=true CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_desktop tauri build --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
